text.title: ops-subscription-models Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ops-subscription-models as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: No annual billing option at launch.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Annual subscribers churn 3–5x less. Missing annual billing at launch means all early customers are monthly, with no commitment lock-in and no cash flow improvement.

failure-mode.description: Making cancellation difficult (multi-step forms, mandatory calls).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Difficult cancellation increases chargebacks, generates negative reviews, and is illegal in some jurisdictions. Easy cancellation builds trust and sometimes produces "saved" customers who were testing how painful it is.
